siren_framing: trained SIREN NTK drifts 0.64 (median rel.) vs FF-MLP 6.92; where drift is large the init-NTK prediction is not expected to hold, so we report only that trained SIREN responses are inconsistent with the initialization-NTK prediction -- not that they 'leave' a fixed kernel.
note: empirical extrapolation only; predictions from each network's own init-NTK linearization (bandlimited: exact dictionary); NTK drift measured init-vs-trained; seeds (sampling/feature/weight) crossed independently; CIs cluster-bootstrapped by sampling scenario; amplitude swept to 0 for the infinitesimal-influence limit; all runs recorded including failures
